message.content:
I need to fix CSS classes on outer wrapper divs in page files. For each file listed below in C:/Users/User/citedby-ai/pages/, replace the SPECIFIC wrapper class patterns with a clean wrapper. Only modify the FIRST occurrence of each pattern (the outermost wrapper div).

Use sed commands. For each file, replace ONLY the exact pattern found (do NOT use global replace — use the first-occurrence only).

Here are the exact replacements needed:

1. Account.tsx line 221: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

2. ActionPlan.tsx line 228: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500 pb-24"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500 pb-24"`

3. ActionPlan.tsx line 203: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 min-h-[80vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center"` to `className="min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center"`

4. Affiliation.tsx line 112: change `className="w-full px-4 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500 relative"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500 relative"`

5. AiCitationSimulator.tsx line ~132: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

6. AiMonitoring.tsx: there are TWO wrapper divs at lines 223 and 606, both `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` → change to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`. Use sed to replace ALL occurrences since both need fixing.

7. AiResponseLayer.tsx line 268: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

8. AlertsAEO.tsx line 306: change `className="w-full px-4 sm:px-6 py-6 sm:py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

9. Analyze.tsx line 43: change `className="w-full px-4 min-h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)] flex flex-col items-center justify-center animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

10. AnswerFirstAudit.tsx line 169: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

11. ApiDeveloper.tsx line 642: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

12. BlogOptimizer.tsx line 83: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

13. BotTracking.tsx line 347: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

14. Clients.tsx line 764: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

15. ContentWriter.tsx line 135: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

16. Directory.tsx line 664: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

17. DirectoryEntity.tsx line 20: change `className="w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

18. EeatBuilder.tsx line 501: change `className="w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"`

19. GenerativeTools.tsx: change `className="w-full animate-in fade-in duration-500"` to `className="animate-in fade-in duration-500"` AND change `<div className="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 py-6">` to `<div className="space-y-6">`

Use sed -i for each replacement. If sed has trouble with a pattern, use python instead:
```python
import re
with open(file, 'r') as f: content = f.read()
content = content.replace(old, new, 1)
with open(file, 'w') as f: f.write(content)
```

Important: do NOT change any other classes in the files. Only change the exact patterns specified.

content.text: I'll execute these replacements using Python for reliability, since sed on Windows can be tricky with complex patterns. Let me run them in parallel batches.

content.text: All 18 files processed successfully. Let me now verify the replacements were applied correctly by searching for any remaining old patterns and confirming the new patterns exist.

input.command:
python -c "
import os

pages_dir = 'C:/Users/User/citedby-ai/pages'
files_to_check = [
    'Account.tsx', 'ActionPlan.tsx', 'Affiliation.tsx', 'AiCitationSimulator.tsx',
    'AiMonitoring.tsx', 'AiResponseLayer.tsx', 'AlertsAEO.tsx', 'Analyze.tsx',
    'AnswerFirstAudit.tsx', 'ApiDeveloper.tsx', 'BlogOptimizer.tsx', 'BotTracking.tsx',
    'Clients.tsx', 'ContentWriter.tsx', 'Directory.tsx', 'DirectoryEntity.tsx',
    'EeatBuilder.tsx', 'GenerativeTools.tsx'
]

# Check that old patterns no longer exist
old_patterns = [
    'w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500\"',
    'w-full px-4 py-10 animate-in fade-in duration-500 pb-24',
    'w-full px-4 py-10 min-h-[80vh]',
    'w-full px-4 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500 relative',
    'w-full px-6 py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500',
    'w-full px-4 sm:px-6 py-6 sm:py-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500',
    'w-full px-4 min-h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]',
    'w-full animate-in fade-in duration-500',
    'max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 py-6',
]

print('=== Checking for remaining OLD patterns ===')
found_old = False
for f in files_to_check:
    path = os.path.join(pages_dir, f)
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as fh:
        content = fh.read()
    for pat in old_patterns:
        if pat in content:
            print(f'  WARNING: {f} still contains: {pat}')
            found_old = True

if not found_old:
    print('  All old patterns successfully removed!')

print()
print('=== Verifying NEW patterns exist ===')
new_checks = {
    'Account.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'ActionPlan.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500 pb-24\"', 'className=\"min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center\"'],
    'Affiliation.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500 relative\"'],
    'AiCitationSimulator.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'AiMonitoring.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'AiResponseLayer.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'AlertsAEO.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'Analyze.tsx': ['className=\"min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'AnswerFirstAudit.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'ApiDeveloper.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'BlogOptimizer.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'BotTracking.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'Clients.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'ContentWriter.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'Directory.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'DirectoryEntity.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'EeatBuilder.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"'],
    'GenerativeTools.tsx': ['className=\"animate-in fade-in duration-500\"', 'className=\"space-y-6\"'],
}

all_ok = True
for f, patterns in new_checks.items():
    path = os.path.join(pages_dir, f)
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as fh:
        content = fh.read()
    for pat in patterns:
        if pat in content:
            print(f'  OK: {f} has: {pat}')
        else:
            print(f'  MISSING: {f} does NOT have: {pat}')
            all_ok = False

print()
if all_ok:
    print('All 19 replacements across 18 files verified successfully.')
else:
    print('Some replacements may need attention.')
"

content.text:
All 19 replacements across 18 files completed and verified successfully. Here is a summary of what was changed:

**Files modified in `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\`:**

| # | File | Change |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | `Account.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 py-10` from wrapper |
| 2 | `ActionPlan.tsx` (line ~228) | Removed `w-full px-4 py-10` from main wrapper |
| 3 | `ActionPlan.tsx` (line ~203) | Changed `w-full px-4 py-10 min-h-[80vh]` to `min-h-[60vh]` on loading wrapper |
| 4 | `Affiliation.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 py-8` from wrapper |
| 5 | `AiCitationSimulator.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 6 | `AiMonitoring.tsx` (2 occurrences) | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from both wrappers |
| 7 | `AiResponseLayer.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 8 | `AlertsAEO.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 sm:px-6 py-6 sm:py-8` from wrapper |
| 9 | `Analyze.tsx` | Changed `w-full px-4 min-h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]` to `min-h-[60vh]` |
| 10 | `AnswerFirstAudit.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 11 | `ApiDeveloper.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 12 | `BlogOptimizer.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 py-10` from wrapper |
| 13 | `BotTracking.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 14 | `Clients.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 15 | `ContentWriter.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 py-10` from wrapper |
| 16 | `Directory.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 py-10` from wrapper |
| 17 | `DirectoryEntity.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-4 py-10` from wrapper |
| 18 | `EeatBuilder.tsx` | Removed `w-full px-6 py-8` from wrapper |
| 19 | `GenerativeTools.tsx` | Removed `w-full` from outer wrapper + replaced `max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 py-6` with `space-y-6` |

The common pattern across most files was stripping `w-full` and padding/sizing classes (`px-4`, `px-6`, `py-8`, `py-10`, etc.) from the outermost wrapper divs, leaving only the animation classes and any page-specific modifiers (like `pb-24`, `relative`, or centering utilities).
